Home.description: Building transparent and sustainable industrial cooperation between global markets through consulting, trade coordination, and intelligent digital infrastructure.

About.label: ABOUT WANG CORP.
About.title: Global industrial coordination with modern digital infrastructure.
About.description: WANG CORP. operates as an international coordination and infrastructure company focused on heavy industry, engineering partnerships, strategic sourcing, industrial digitalization, and AI-assisted communication.

transparent.title: Transparent Coordination
transparent.text: We believe trust is built through operational transparency, realistic expectations, and long-term cooperation rather than short-term transactions.

markets.title: Bridging Global Markets
markets.text: WANG CORP. works as a bridge between international industrial ecosystems, supporting both global companies entering China and Chinese companies expanding abroad.

lean.title: Lean & Efficient Operations
lean.text: We prioritize efficiency, agility, and practical execution over unnecessary corporate overhead and inflated operational structures.

digital.title: Digital Industrial Infrastructure
digital.text: Alongside industrial consulting and coordination, WANG CORP. is developing intelligent digital platforms designed to simplify global industrial communication and collaboration.

Services.label: SERVICES
Services.title: Industrial systems built for international cooperation.
Services.description: WANG CORP. provides coordination, sourcing, communication, and infrastructure services focused on heavy industry and global industrial operations.

coordination.title: Industrial Coordination
coordination.text: International supplier coordination, RFQ management, project tracking, and engineering communication support.

sourcing.title: Strategic Sourcing
sourcing.text: Global industrial procurement and manufacturing partnerships focused on steel, mining, and heavy industry sectors.

infrastructure.title: Digital Infrastructure
infrastructure.text: Enterprise-grade industrial platforms integrating AI, multilingual communication, and operational coordination.

communication.title: AI-Assisted Communication
communication.text: Real-time multilingual industrial communication and coordination systems for global business operations.

Platform.label: WANG PLATFORM
Platform.title: Industrial Coordination System
Platform.description: Enterprise-grade digital infrastructure for supplier coordination, multilingual communication, RFQ management, and international industrial collaboration.

translation.title: AI Translation Layer
translation.text: Multilingual communication infrastructure designed for industrial terminology, supplier coordination, and cross-border project communication.

crm.title: Industrial CRM
crm.text: Company, plant, department, contact, project, and equipment-level relationship management designed specifically for heavy industry.

rfq.title: RFQ Management
rfq.text: Structured request, quotation, document, and technical clarification workflows for international industrial procurement.

supplier.title: Supplier Coordination
supplier.text: A controlled workspace for suppliers, clients, engineers, and coordinators to communicate through a single transparent channel.

portal.title: Secure Client Portal
portal.text: Permission-based access for clients, suppliers, and internal users with controlled visibility across projects, files, and messages.

project.title: Project Communication
project.text: Centralized project records, meeting notes, technical discussions, and progress updates for long-cycle industrial cooperation.

documents.title: Document Center
documents.text: Organized storage for catalogs, drawings, quotations, specifications, project documents, inspection files, and commercial records.

global.title: Global Collaboration
global.text: A digital foundation for industrial cooperation between China, Türkiye, Europe, and global heavy industry markets.

Contact.label: CONTACT
Contact.title: Contact Infrastructure Under Development
Contact.description: Official WANG CORP. communication channels, enterprise email infrastructure, and client access systems are currently being prepared.
